title: Michigan Tech Researchers Develop Sustainable Building Material from Wood Waste
summary_en: More efficient use of lumber byproducts leads to more sustainable forest management. That's why Michigan Technological University researchers are developing a biomaterial lighter than steel and just as strong, made from leftover wood waste, that could revolutionize the lumber industry.  . . .
title_cn: 密歇根理工大学研究人员利用木材废料开发可持续建筑材料

title: The Closer: Computer Science Grad Takes Every Project to the Finish Line
summary_en: Computer science student Ashley Baird is the kind of person who thrives on completing what she starts. Baird's drive to see things through resulted in a successful machine learning project for the U.S. Department of Defense and an internship at  . . .
title_cn: 密歇根理工大学计算机专业应届毕业生阿什利·贝尔德善始善终完成所有立项项目
